Subsection.title: Name
Subsection.Paragraph: Hetzner - Support for the Hetzner DNS API

Subsection.title: Description
Subsection.Paragraph: The Hetzner DNS configurator supports creating and deleting DNS records using the Hetzner DNS API.
The output accepts the following parameters:
If not specified, the configurator defaults to the production API base address https://dns.hetzner.com/api/v1/.
